BearerAuth.description: Hashed API token resolved to a tenant-scoped principal with named trstctl permissions.

SessionCookie.description: Verified OIDC browser session; mutating requests also require the double-submit CSRF token.
SessionCookie.name: trstctl_session

info.description: Resource-oriented REST API for trstctl. Mutations require an Idempotency-Key; errors are RFC 7807 problem+json; lists use cursor pagination.
info.title: trstctl API
